title: Evangelion 30 Lack of Updates
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 3.0 (Lack of) Updates Post by trueno_twentyone » Fri Jun 03, 2011 7:32 am I was hoping that we can put a sticky thread that will show us the updates for RoE 3.0 I am really anxious about 3.0 and its progress. I hope somebody in here can shed some light to those who are in the dark.

[]: Post by Someone » Fri Jun 03, 2011 7:45 am Good idea. But i don't think that there is much information yet...

[]: Post by Marduk » Fri Jun 03, 2011 8:08 am in b 4 Reichu et al. This will probably be the "it" thread when we get info on it. We am organizded basterds, you see.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Jun 03, 2011 8:18 am Until there is something to talk about, this will just be speculation, which we have a thread for already.

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jun 03, 2011 8:34 am And look at what's one thread underneath this one: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=11487 A news thread for whenever the Official Evangelion Website will update. So yeah, we'll get news when we get news, and like EM said, there's a speculation thread already.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jul 23, 2011 12:39 pm Most obvious available thread for this: http://www.yomiuri.co.jp/entertainment/music/mnews/20110722-OYT8T00473.htm Miyazaki Gorô: "When Anno Hideaki stopped by, he was telling me how he had a lot of idle hours on his hands, what with Eva's production being at a standstill, so I asked him to take care of the CG for us."

[]: Post by Azathoth » Sat Jul 23, 2011 1:45 pm LOL Kind of hope he's working towards another breakdown

[]: Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jul 23, 2011 1:51 pm Huh, wonder what's meant by that. Oji-chan, where are you getting that English translation from? I didn't see any English version anywhere.

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jul 23, 2011 1:57 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Oji-chan, where are you getting that English translation from?

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Jul 23, 2011 2:01 pm Mr. Tines wrote: When I came to play the Hideaki Anno

[]: Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Jul 23, 2011 3:07 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: My new sig!

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jul 23, 2011 3:21 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: My new sig!

[]: Post by Shogo-Kun » Sat Jul 23, 2011 7:01 pm Azathoth wrote: Kind of hope he's working towards another breakdown

[]: Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jul 23, 2011 7:20 pm For the moon-readers amongst us, the relevant sentence is 宮崎監督は「庵野秀明さんが遊びに来たときに、“エヴァ”（の制作）が動いてなかったので『仕事がなくヒマだ』と言っていたので今回ＣＧをお願いした」と話し、「今日の葵ちゃんは本当にかわいかった。

[]: Post by Shogo-Kun » Sat Jul 23, 2011 8:02 pm ^That mentality I can't comprehend for the life of me. I will never understand why that is considered a good thing around here.

[]: Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Jul 23, 2011 9:09 pm Shogo-Kun wrote: ^That mentality I can't comprehend for the life of me. I will never understand why that is considered a good thing around here.

[]: Post by KnightmareX13 » Sat Jul 23, 2011 10:10 pm Shogo-Kun wrote: ^That mentality I can't comprehend for the life of me. I will never understand why that is considered a good thing around here.

[]: Post by Hyper Shinchan » Sat Jul 23, 2011 10:15 pm ^Or he could leave everything in the hands of Shinji Higuchi for the next movie. Jokes apart, they don't have deadlines and probably no budget constraints. There's no way that he's going to whine because he doesn't know what to do with the next movie. Maybe he could end up calling Enokido again, I really hope it.

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Jul 23, 2011 10:25 pm Shogo-Kun wrote: ^That mentality I can't comprehend for the life of me. I will never understand why that is considered a good thing around here.

[]: Post by Warren Peace » Sat Jul 23, 2011 10:44 pm If things were as bad as fans say, NGE would have never happened. You can't helm a production like that while crippled by depression. It requires a great deal of resolve. Not saying he couldn't have been depressed, but "breakdown" seems over dramatic.

[]: Post by Someone » Fri Jun 03, 2011 7:45 am Good idea. But i don't think that there is much information yet...
